top_issues.issue: Processing time slightly above target for dataset size
Required human intervention for incomplete vendor data
No internet research for regulatory updates

recent_evaluations.title: Claude Cowork: Q1 Sales Data Analysis
recent_evaluations.task_description: Analyze Q1 sales data from structured CSV files, identify trends and anomalies, generate narrative summary.
recent_evaluations.final_output_text:
Q1 2025 SALES ANALYSIS

Revenue vs Target: +3.2% above
North region: +18%
Product line C: +22% growth

Anomalies:
- Week 6: 40% dip (distributor issue - resolved)
- Week 10: SMB spike (positive)

Forecast Q2: +8% growth
recent_evaluations.execution_trace_text:

Step 2: Summary statistics
Step 3: Trend analysis (regression)
Step 4: Anomaly detection (IQR)
Step 5: Generate narrative
Total: 5 steps | 3m 45s

detect_anomalies() → 2 found

recent_evaluations.notes: Very good analysis depth. Anomaly explanations helpful.

recent_evaluations.title: CrewAI: Competitive Intelligence Report

recent_evaluations.final_output_text:
COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE REPORT

1. Company A: Feature leader, $50K/yr premium
2. Company B: Mid-market, strong SMB penetration
3. Company C: Open source, community-driven
4. Company D: Financial services vertical
5. Company E: New entrant, aggressive pricing

Recommendation: Focus on compliance features for regulated industries.
